---

## Derivation of `claude_expected.jsonl` from `claude_full.jsonl`

### Input → Output mapping (24 input lines → 10 output lines)

| Full line(s) | Input type | Action | Output line |

| **4** | `user` (promptId `1a789a48`, text "I need to revert…") | emitted as user row | **→ line 1** |
| 5+6 | two `assistant` fragments sharing `msg_01A8w8vJNhp54SKt6N4Pdg6W` — line 5 is thinking-only, line 6 has text + final usage (3 in, 102 out); merged, thinking stripped, ts from line 6 wins | emitted as one assistant row | **→ line 2** |

| 9 | `file-history-snapshot` | **dropped** | — |

| 11+12 | two `assistant` fragments sharing `msg_01XBRjv2YCFQs34eaLK7w9XF` — line 11 thinking-only, line 12 has `tool_use toolu_01NFoPKsjrNsBZ4PJ4r8uSF2` + final usage (3 in, 113 out); merged + thinking stripped; look-ahead consumes line 13 (tool_result), inlining result | emitted as one assistant row with result inlined | **→ line 4** |
| **13** | `user` (tool_result for `toolu_01NFoPKsjrNsBZ4PJ4r8uSF2`, stdout="test\n\nEntire-Checkpoint: ecf782729563\nEntire-Checkpoint: c81467b72ca0") | consumed by look-ahead, result inlined into line 4 | — |
| **14** | `assistant` `msg_01YDHWjQkYdHk5EjK4amSHy7`, text, usage (1 in, 39 out) — no next tool_result | emitted as assistant row | **→ line 5** |
| 15 | `progress` (Stop hook) | **dropped** | — |
| 16 | `system` / stop_hook_summary | **dropped** | — |
| 17 | `file-history-snapshot` | **dropped** | — |
| **18** | `user` (promptId `b5e9d0ae`, text "it shouldn't have this one…") | emitted as user row | **→ line 6** |
| **19** | `assistant` `msg_01XrDL7d4gcLA6MEmcRGKV9T`, `tool_use toolu_017oWPxD8roc925BiDyeQi8t`, usage (3 in, 111 out); look-ahead consumes line 20 (tool_result), inlining result | emitted as one assistant row with result inlined | **→ line 7** |
| **20** | `user` (tool_result for `toolu_017oWPxD8roc925BiDyeQi8t`, stdout="[test-gemini 70a873a] test\n Date: …") | consumed by look-ahead, result inlined into line 7 | — |
| **21** | `assistant` `msg_012jFDQwZT4d12cUgp9oA5Tm`, text "Done. The extra…", usage (1 in, 27 out) | emitted as assistant row | **→ line 8** |
| 22 | `progress` (Stop hook) | **dropped** | — |
| **23** | `user` (promptId `img-prompt-1`, text "when error happens…" + 2 image blocks) | emitted as user row with text block + images verbatim | **→ line 9** |
| **24** | `assistant` `msg_img1`, text "I see the screenshots…", no usage | emitted as assistant row (no `input_tokens`/`output_tokens` since 0) | **→ line 10** |

### Content transformations applied

- **`thinking` / `redacted_thinking` blocks** stripped from assistant content (`stripAssistantContent`)
- **Streaming duplicates** merged: consecutive assistant entries with the same `id` are merged — later `ts` and token counts win
- **Tool results inlined**: when an assistant turn is immediately followed by a user entry containing only `tool_result` blocks, those results are inlined into the matching `tool_use` blocks in the assistant content. The `toolUseResult.stdout` field enriches the `output` field of the result
- **`result` structure**: `{"output":"…","status":"success"}` for non-error; `{"output":"…","status":"error"}` for errors
- **Dropped types**: `progress`, `file-history-snapshot`, `queue-operation`, `system` — all discarded
- **User text extraction**: plain string `content` or `content[].type=="text"` extracted; `type=="tool_result"` consumed; `type=="image"` passed through verbatim
- **Every output line** carries `"v":1,"agent":"claude-code","cli_version":"0.5.1"` (from `defaultOpts` / `MetadataFields`)

The existing `claude_expected.jsonl` is already correct — no changes needed. It faithfully represents the output of running `Compact(redact.AlreadyRedacted(claude_full.jsonl), MetadataFields{Agent:"claude-code", CLIVersion:"0.5.1"})`.
